journal_entry.description: Construction of land improvements and payment for landscaping installations
journal_entry.rationale: Fencing, streetlights, walkways, and permanent landscaping are land improvements with finite useful lives, capitalized as a separate asset class from land. Cash decreases for both payments totaling $4,110,000.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Both expenditures relate to land improvements surrounding the factory (fencing, streetlights, walkways, and permanent landscaping). These are depreciable capital improvements distinct from land itself. Total debits ($4,110,000 to Land Improvements) equal total credits ($4,110,000 cash reduction). One asset increases, one decreases.
